page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.re8.30xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance within the ecs.re8 family, running on the KVM hypervisor. It features 120 dedicated physical cores powered by Intel Xeon 8490H processors operating at a base frequency of 1.9 GHz. The instance is configured with 2048.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high resource density of approximately 17.07 GB of RAM per core.

This server type does not include local storage, requiring external network-attached storage solutions for persistent data. It provides a baseline network bandwidth of 32 Gbps and does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses. A key hardware trade-off is the lack of hyperthreading, as the system allocates exactly one thread per physical core, combined with a relatively low base clock speed of 1.9 GHz, which prioritizes parallel memory-bound execution over high single-threaded clock speeds.

From a qualitative cost efficiency perspective, the ecs.re8.30xlarge offers high memory density per physical core, making it suitable for large-scale in-memory databases, enterprise resource planning (ERP) systems, and heavy caching layers. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures predictable compute performance for memory-intensive enterprise workloads that do not require local GPU acceleration.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.re8.30xlarge is a memory-optimized server instance running on the KVM hypervisor. It is equipped with 120 dedicated physical cores utilizing Intel Xeon 8490H processors at a base speed of 1.9 GHz. The instance features 2048.0 GB of RAM, providing a high memory-to-core ratio of 17.07 GB per core. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying instead on network-attached storage and offering a baseline network bandwidth of 32 Gbps. The CPU configuration allocates one thread per core without hyperthreading, ensuring dedicated compute resources. This hardware profile is designed for memory-intensive workloads, such as large-scale in-memory databases, enterprise resource planning systems, and complex data processing tasks that require substantial memory capacity without local storage requirements.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.re8.30xlarge is a memory-optimized KVM instance with 120 dedicated Intel Xeon 8490H cores, 2048.0 GB of RAM, and 32 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for large-scale in-memory database workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.re8.30xlarge is a memory-optimized KVM server featuring 120 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 2048.0 GB of RAM, and 32 Gbps network bandwidth.
tagline: A memory-optimized server featuring one hundred and twenty dedicated physical cores and two terabytes of RAM for massive in-memory workloads.
bullet_points: 120 dedicated Intel Xeon 8490H physical cores with no hyperthreading.
2048.0 GB of system memory providing 17.07 GB of RAM per core.
32 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for external data transfers.
Zero local storage, requiring network-attached storage solutions.
Designed for large-scale in-memory databases and enterprise applications.
